question: Who was the CEO of the company that agreed to buy Cursor's maker in June 2026, at the time of the deal?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
The company that agreed to buy Cursor's maker (Anysphere) in June 2026 was SpaceX, and its CEO at the time of the deal was Elon Musk.

Source: [Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/legal/transactional/spacex-buy-anysphere-60-billion-2026-06-16/), [TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2026/06/16/spacex-to-acquire-cursor-for-60b-in-stock-days-after-blockbuster-ipo/)

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer: **Elon Musk** was CEO of SpaceX when it agreed to acquire Anysphere, the maker of Cursor, in June 2026. [CNBC](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/06/16/spacex-spcx-cursor-acquisition-ipo.html)
